headline: Bank Of America Art Consulting Adds Dimension To Wealth And Valuation Story
summary: Bank of America Private Bank has introduced a new Art Consulting service for clients. The service focuses on helping high net worth individuals manage art as both an investment and cultural asset. It is designed to bring nonfinancial assets like art into broader wealth planning discussions. For investors watching NYSE:BAC, this move adds another layer to Bank of America’s broad wealth management offering. headline: How The CSX (CSX) Investment Story Is Shifting With New Targets And Rail Freight Trends
summary: CSX’s fair value estimate has shifted to US$40.31 from US$39.85, a small adjustment that reflects a fresh look at the stock’s pricing. That change sits against a mix of bullish and cautious analyst views, where some firms are lifting targets while others are trimming them as they weigh rail and freight trends. Read on to see what is driving these moves and how you can track the evolving CSX story. Stay updated as the Fair Value for CSX shifts by adding it to your watchlist or portfolio...

headline: VantageScore CEO to Participate in Bank of America’s 2026 Information & Business Services Conference
summary: SAN FRANCISCO, March 04, 2026--Silvio Tavares, President and CEO of VantageScore, will participate in Bank of America’s 2026 Information & Business Services Conference on March 12, 2026, in New York. Mr. Tavares is scheduled to speak from 10:00 a.m. to 10:35 a.m. Eastern Daylight Time in a fireside chat moderated by Curtis Nagle, Managing Director and Senior Equity Research Analyst at Bank of America Securities.
